hooks.prompt: Evaluate whether the upcoming Bash command is safe to execute in an agentic coding workflow. Only allow read-only or test commands (ls, cat, grep, test, npm test, pytest, mvn test, go test, dotnet test). Block destructive commands (rm, rmdir, del, Remove-Item, kubectl delete) and destructive SQL (DROP, TRUNCATE). Input JSON: $ARGUMENTS. Respond with JSON only: {"ok": true} or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."}.
